title: callista subteres
intro: Callista subteres, also known as the 'purple coral tree', is a type of flowering plant native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Callista subteres include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant is typically prepared as a tincture or infused in hot water to make a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
